attributes.action: Recall petition for MPs who change parties
attributes.additional_details: I would like the government through the parliamentary procedures panel to make it mandatory anyone who changes a party mid Parliament should face an automatic by election
attributes.background: MPs who change parties mid term should face an automatic by election As the people who voted for the MP did so because they like their parties policies

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

By-elections to be called automatically when MPs defect to another party
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/737660
